title: hdWGCNA identifies co-expression networks in high-dimensional transcriptomics data.
author: Morabito S Reese F Rahimzadeh N Miyoshi E Swarup V
content: S-EPMC10326379 PMC10326379 hdWGCNA identifies co-expression networks in high-dimensional transcriptomics data. Biological systems are immensely complex, organized into a multi-scale hierarchy of functional units based on tightly regulated interactions between distinct molecules, cells, organs
